summary: Tested WebSocket implementation for GameLobby real-time updates. Fixed critical bug in server.py (line 2913) where WebSocket endpoint used undefined 'SECRET_KEY' instead of 'JWT_SECRET'. All 15 backend API tests pass. Frontend GameLobby.jsx component verified with WebSocket connection code, status indicator, and fallback polling.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Test user has no minted photos, so full game flow (create->join->ready->start) could not be tested end-to-end.
context_for_next_testing_agent: WebSocket lobby feature is implemented and working. Fixed JWT_SECRET bug in server.py line 2913. Test user (test2@blendlink.com) has no minted photos, so cannot create/join games. To fully test WebSocket real-time updates, need a user with 5+ minted photos or create test photos in database.

backend_apis: GET /api/photo-game/open-games/{game_id} - Gets game details (404 for invalid)
POST /api/photo-game/open-games/start/{game_id} - Validates game status (404 for invalid)
GET /api/photo-game/battle-photos - Returns user's battle-ready photos (200 OK)
frontend_components: GameLobby.jsx - WebSocket connection with reconnection logic
GameLobby.jsx - Fallback polling when WebSocket fails
GameLobby.jsx - Ready button with optimistic updates
GameLobby.jsx - Countdown overlay when both players ready

bug_fixed.issue: WebSocket endpoint used undefined 'SECRET_KEY' instead of 'JWT_SECRET'
bug_fixed.fix: Changed jwt.decode(token, SECRET_KEY, algorithms=['HS256']) to jwt.decode(token, JWT_SECRET, algorithms=[JWT_ALGORITHM])
